chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2284 of 2019 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No. 10227/2019 2. For hearing of main case 27.03.2025 Mr. Darvesh K. Mandhan, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Azad Hussain advocate holds brief for Mr. Muhammad Bilal Bhatti, advocate for respondent Mr. Muhammad Siddiqui advocate holds brief for Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for respondent Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General Per learned counsel, finalization of assessment is pending due to this petition. He seeks that the assessment be finalized in accordance with law, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and pending the aforesaid no coercive action be taken there against. Learned counsel for respondent articulates no cavil in such regard and states that the petition be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
